changePassword.title: Beddel sirta ah
changePassword.description: Fadlan geli sirta ee hadda iyo kan cusub

toastMessages.passwordUpdateSuccessfully: Cusboonaysiinta sirta si guul leh dhameystiray
toastMessages.failedToUpdatePassword: Ku guuldareystay in la cusboonaysiiyo sirta

validation.passwordRequired: Furaha sirta ah ayaa loo baahan yahay
validation.passwordMinLength: Furaha sirta ah waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 5 xaraf
validation.passwordMaxLength: Sirta ah waa inuusan dhaafin 15 xaraf
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: Furaha cusubi la mid ma noqon karo

forgotPassword.description: Fadlan geli magacaaga isticmaale ee diiwaangashan iyo Lambarka telefoonka si aad dib ugu dejiso sirta ah.

validation.phoneNumberrequired: Lambarka taleefanka ayaa loo baahan yahay

passwordReset.title: Dib u habaynta sirta
passwordReset.description: Furahaaga ama sirtat si guul leh ayaa dib loo bedelay Hoos ku dhufo si aad u gasho

otpVerification.title: Xaqiijinta lambarka sirta ah (OTP)
otpVerification.description: Fadlan geli lambarka sirta ah (OTP) ee laguugu soo diray lambarkaaga moobiilka. Meeshan waa qasab in la buuxiyo.

buttons.resendOtp: Mar kale dir OTP-ga ama lambarka sirta ah

toastMessages.failedToResendOtp: Ku guuldareystay inuu dib u soo diro OTP
toastMessages.otpIdNotFound: Aqoonsiga lambarka sirta ah (OTP) lama helin. Fadlan codso OTP cusub.
toastMessages.somethingWentWrong: Wax baa khaldamay isku day markale!

newPassword.title: Beddel furaha sirta ee cusub
newPassword.description: Samee furaha sirta ah ee cusub Hubi inay ka duwan tahay kuwii hore xagga amniga.

validation.passwordRequired: Furaha sirta ah ayaa loo baahan yahay
validation.passwordMinLength: Furaha sirta ah waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 5 xaraf
validation.passwordMaxLength: Furaha sirta ah waa inuusan dhaafin 15 xaraf
validation.passwordsDoNotMatch: Labadan sir isku mid ma aha

step1.title: Tallaabada 1 — Xaqiijinta Mobilka
step1.heading: Geli lambarkaaga mobilka
step1.description: Geli lambarkaaga Ethio Telecom si aad u bilowdo NameTAG. Waxaan kuu soo diri doonaa kood xaqiijin hal mar ah.
step1.mobile_error: Lambarka taleefanku waa inuu ka bilaabmaa 9 oo uu leeyahay 9 lambar (marka laga reebo koodka dalka)

step2.title: Tallaabada 2 — Aqoonsiga Fayda
step2.heading: Xaqiiji aqoonsigaaga Fayda
step2.description: Fadlan xaqiiji aqoonsigaaga ID-ga qaranka (Fayda) si aad u sii waddo diiwaangelinta. Waxaa laguu wareejin doonaa bogga Fayda ka dibna si toos ah ayaad ugu soo laaban doontaa marka la xaqiijiyo.
step2.after_text: Kadib xaqiijinta bogga Fayda, waxaa laguu soo celin doonaa halkan oo foomka diiwaangelinta si toos ah ayaa loo buuxin doonaa.

step3.title: Tallaabada 3 — Diiwaangelin
step3.heading: Dhamee diiwaangelintaada
step3.limit_error_title: Xadka xaqiijinta Fayda waa la gaaray.
step3.limit_error: Waxaad dhaaftay tirada ugu badan ee xaqiijin ee Fayda (NID) la doortay. Fadlan isticmaal lambar mobil kale ama xaqiiji Fayda (NID) kale oo ku xiran lambarkaaga mobilka.
step3.auto_fill: Faahfaahinta si toos ah looga buuxiyay aqoonsiga Fayda ee la xaqiijiyay
step3.password_hint: Dherer 5-15 • hal xaraf weyn • hal xaraf yar • hal calaamad gaar ah (@#$%&*)
